metadata.title: ProductPic AI
metadata.description: Enter product details and reference images to quickly generate visuals for ecommerce listings, ads, and social campaigns.

hero.title: ProductPic AI
hero.description: Enter product details and reference images to quickly generate visuals for ecommerce listings, ads, and social campaigns.
hero.tip: Built for Shopify, Amazon, direct-to-consumer stores, advertising, and social commerce workflows.

features.title: Why teams use ProductPic AI
features.description: Everything you need to move from product brief to polished commercial creative.

items.title: Preset commercial styles
items.description: Choose from clean marketplace, luxury editorial, DTC minimal, social ad, natural organic, and tech premium directions.

items.title: Reference-aware generation
items.description: Upload product references to keep packaging, materials, and product shape aligned with the real item.

items.title: Channel-ready crops
items.description: Optimize output for Amazon, Shopify, Instagram, and Xiaohongshu with matching aspect ratios.

items.title: Credit-based workflow
items.description: Keep production usage predictable with quality tiers and transparent credit costs.

items.title: Async task tracking
items.description: Follow generation progress, inspect results, and retry without losing the workflow context.

items.title: Store-ready downloads
items.description: Download the final image immediately and keep moving from review to publish.

stats.title: Built for real ecommerce output
stats.description: A compact workflow that keeps product visuals consistent across campaigns.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything product teams usually want to know before generating their first batch.

items.question: What kinds of products work best?
items.answer: Any product with a clear physical form works well, especially packaging, accessories, beauty, apparel, home goods, and consumer electronics.

items.question: Can I use my own reference images?
items.answer: Yes. You can upload product and brand references so the generated image stays closer to the real item.

items.question: How much does one image cost?
items.answer: Pricing is tied to the quality level you choose, so the cost stays predictable before generation starts.

items.question: How long are the results available?
items.answer: Generated image links are temporary, so download approved assets right away and keep them in your asset library.

cta.title: Start generating product images today
cta.description: Turn briefs into visuals that are ready for stores, ads, and product pages.
